name: Native Folder Dialog
summary: Backend handler that opens a native OS folder selection dialog and returns the selected path
goals: Open native OS folder picker dialogs securely
Return selected folder path and register as project if needed

specDetail.description: Exposes POST /api/open-folder endpoint that invokes a native OS folder selection dialog (via native-dialog utility), returns the selected path, and optionally registers it as a project.

parameters.name: registerProject
parameters.description: Whether to auto-register the selected folder as a project (default true)

constraints: Must only allow selection of existing directories, not files
Must validate the returned path exists and is accessible
Must handle permission errors gracefully and return appropriate error codes

acceptanceCriteria.when: the user selects a valid folder in the native dialog
acceptanceCriteria.then: the folder path is returned and the folder is registered as a project

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
